Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.set

Class ReadOnlySetProperty<E>

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.set.ReadOnlySetProperty<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ObservableSet<E>, ObservableSetValue<E>, Observable, ObservableValue<ObservableSet<E>>, ReadOnlyProperty<ObservableSet<E>>, ObservableObjectValue<ObservableSet<E>>, Iterable<E>, Collection<E>, Set<E>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SetProperty
public class ReadOnlySetProperty<E> extends Object implements ReadOnlyProperty<ObservableSet<E>>, ObservableSetValue<E>
